title: Deeper MC
description: Gives some Flat Blocks more Depth by making them 3D but still Minecrafty! Effects: Mushrooms, Nether Fungi, Crops, Brewing Stands, Ladders and Rails!
body:
# Deeper MC
**Gives certain flat blocks** their own **3D model**, while still **sticking to the Minecraft style**. Inspired by MC Dungeons use of 3D block models.

## Effected Blocks
- ### Mushrooms, Nether Fungi
(features random offset if [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) is installed)

![Mushrooms are now Deeper than ever](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/6d5f2708f6cd563c165252838fc3f669d8a17f08.png)
![Deep Fungi (no they don't glow)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/69967d6d7abbc4278cb80b429f3b21b2f9f16444.png)
- ### Rails, Ladders
![Rails now have 2 layers and are not streached when raised](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/75e2d924ce167658c5c6acd178d0e4ce21387a4d.png)
![Ladders now also have 2 layers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/b2a102d2f5d38b9983f640c792066a40e518d393.png)
- ### Carrots, Beetroots, Potatoes
![Carrots, Beetroots and Potatoes are now 3D when fully grown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/5891b707f5c0f3351568fe19d903e0da607e815f.png)
- ### Brewing Stand
![The Brewing Stand's potion bottles are now also 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eK9yQLpt/images/99e33f66a0ae32904599f10fb1d6124dfc8d51d5.png)

### [→ Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/deeper-mc/gallery)
